task: Recommend how the mobile remote should present agent output versus diagnostics.
context: Screen context: Latest response shows CODEX started respond. Bridge events shows the same activity line. A system toast says Criteria approved. Running agents. The user says they cannot separate each agent's actual answer from system noise.

expected.preferred_response_shape: UI recommendation focused on default visibility
must_include: hide bridge or system diagnostics by default
keep diagnostics available behind a button
must_avoid: show activity events as latest answer
